Table of Contents

Enum esriWorkspacePropertyType

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Workspace Properties.

[Guid("39A7FC64-6E7A-479A-9212-EC3B7EAAC43D")]
public enum esriWorkspacePropertyType

Fields

esriWorkspacePropCanAnalyze = 5

5: Whether the Workspace can analyze tables or not (VT_BOOL).

esriWorkspacePropCanEdit = 1

1: Whether the Workspace is editable or not (VT_BOOL).

esriWorkspacePropCanExecuteSQL = 0

0: Whether the ExecuteSQL function works or not (VT_BOOL).

esriWorkspacePropCanGetConfigurationKeywords = 6

6: Whether the Workspace can return a list of configuration keywords (VT_BOOL).

esriWorkspacePropCloudDataWarehouse = 19

19: Whether the Workspace is a Cloud Data Warehouse platform (VT_BOOL).

esriWorkspacePropDBMSReleaseNumber = 18

18: The DBMS release number of the database that the Workspace is connected to.

esriWorkspacePropDBMSReleaseString = 25

25: The DBMS release string of the database that the Workspace is connected to (VT_BSTR).

esriWorkspacePropHasPrivateEditSession = 9

9: Workspace edit sessions are privately managed by another application.

esriWorkspacePropIsGeoDatabase = 7

7: Whether the Workspace is a GeoDatabase or not (VT_BOOL).

esriWorkspacePropIsReadonly = 2

2: Whether the Workspace is read-only or not (VT_BOOL).

esriWorkspacePropLastCompressDate = 12

12: Date of the last compression operation (VT_DATE).

esriWorkspacePropLastCompressStatus = 13

13: Status of the last compression operation (VT_BSTR).

esriWorkspacePropMaxWhereClauseLength = 8

8: The maximum length of the where clause used in queries.

esriWorkspacePropSupportsArchiving = 14

14: Whether the Workspace supports archiving (VT_BOOL).

esriWorkspacePropSupportsBigInteger = 21

21: Whether the Workspace supports 64-bit integers (VT_BOOL).

esriWorkspacePropSupportsBigObjectID = 20

20: Whether the Workspace supports 64-bit object ID (VT_BOOL).

esriWorkspacePropSupportsDateOnly = 23

23: Whether the Workspace supports dateOnly (VT_BOOL).

esriWorkspacePropSupportsExtensionDatasets = 11

11: Whether the Workspace supports extension datasets or not (VT_BOOL).

esriWorkspacePropSupportsHighPrecisionStorage = 10

10: Whether the Workspace supports the high-precision storage model or not (VT_BOOL).

esriWorkspacePropSupportsMetadata = 4

4: Whether the Workspace supports metadata or not (VT_BOOL).

esriWorkspacePropSupportsMoveEditsToBase = 15

15: Whether the Workspace supports move-edits-to-base registration (VT_BOOL).

esriWorkspacePropSupportsQualifiedNames = 3

3: Whether the Workspace can qualify names (VT_BOOL).

esriWorkspacePropSupportsQueryPagination = 17

17: Whether the Workspace supports pagination of queries (VT_BOOL).

esriWorkspacePropSupportsTimeOnly = 22

22: Whether the Workspace supports timeOnly (VT_BOOL).

esriWorkspacePropSupportsTimestampOffset = 24

24: Whether the Workspace supports timestampOffset (VT_BOOL).

esriWorkspacePropSupportsUndoRedo = 16

16: Whether the Workspace supports undo/redo in an edit session (VT_BOOL).
